candidates.name: demosaic-mhc (MHC on preview vs bilinear)
candidates.description: ORF renders double demosaic: full-res MHC + preview-res MHC. Expected faster: MHC full + bilinear preview.
candidates.measurement_status: ADR-4 established +22% for RGGB-specialized vs generic, needs corpus validation
candidates.gate: flipflop demosaic_variants.rs on real ORF/DNG corpus ≥5%

candidates.name: Demosaic phased-MHC specialization (MEASURED +22%)
candidates.description: RGGB-specialized MHC path ~22% faster than generic per-pixel CFA-dispatch
candidates.measurement_status: ADR-4 documented +22%, requires flipflop confirmation on production corpus

candidates.name: pack_rgb16_full redundant pass
candidates.description: Encodes full-res RGB16 twice: once for output, once for progressive-profile. Opportunity: fuse or LE-transmute.
candidates.measurement_status: Not measured; requires deep trace of WASM export pipeline

candidates.name: rgb_to_rgba scatter (SIMD v128 shuffle)
candidates.description: Scalar 3→4 channel spread; SIMD v128 shuffle opportunity for frame-stats input

candidates.name: Integer downscale reciprocal multiply
candidates.description: 3 divides per pixel (5× thumbnail) vs precomputed reciprocal (1 multiply + rounding)
candidates.measurement_status: Comment notes 1800→360 (5×) is a current benchmark target

candidates.name: Float downscale x-bounds recompute
candidates.description: Recompute x0/x1 per (dy,dx) vs hoist outside inner loop (float downscale path)
candidates.measurement_status: Not measured; likely cold path (exact factors more common)

candidates.name: LookRenderer clone overhead
candidates.description: LookRenderer clones ~13MB RGB buffer per slider tick. Opportunity: reusable scratch allocator.
candidates.gate: flipflop real slider workflow with 10+ parameter changes

candidates.name: downscale_rgb16_planar SoA SIMD
candidates.description: Horizontal-add opportunity in downscale accumulation loop (u64→v256)
candidates.measurement_status: Not measured; comment notes LLVM cannot vectorise AoS stride-3
candidates.gate: flipflop planar vs AoS accumulation on large downscale

candidates.name: unpack_rgb16_le 12MB copy per LookRenderer ctor
candidates.description: LE-transmute opportunity instead of vec allocation
candidates.measurement_status: Allocation overhead only, depends on LookRenderer frequency

priority_order: C3 (demosaic RGGB specialization) — 22% documented, lowest effort, highest ROI
C1 (demosaic MHC+bilinear split) — 15-22% plausible, medium effort
C7 (reciprocal multiply in downscale) — 12% likely, trivial effort
C6 (SIMD rgb→rgba) — 15% plausible, medium effort, affects all RGBA paths
C4 (pack_rgb16 redundancy) — 8-10% possible, requires code audit
rejected_candidates: C2 (DNG tile endian) — flipflop measured −3.8% (REJECTED < 5% gate)

next_steps: 1. Measure C3 (demosaic-mhc RGGB vs generic) on synthetic RGGB 512-4096
3. Measure C6 (rgb→rgba shuffle) on 12MP RGBA frame
4. Code audit C4 (pack_rgb16 redundancy) — may require WASM trace
5. Defer C8/C9/C10 to profile data from real workloads
